programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel realises she wants to start dating Ross again and writes him an 18-page letter expressing her feelings - but he falls asleep while reading it. Phoebe and her estranged birth mother discover they have a lot in common, and Monica is stung by a jellyfish

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes on a date with her high-school heart-throb. Ross begins playing tricks on Rachel, and Phoebe convinces herself a stray cat is the reincarnation of her long-dead mother. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself in hot water while dating Rachels pushy boss. Joey decides to buy an encyclopaedia, but discovers he can only afford one volume, and Monica resolves to prove her mother wrong. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Lowell Hawthorne, the President and CEO of Caribbean food producers Golden Krust, dons a disguise to go undercover among the workforce in his own company. Lowell has ambitious plans for expansion and takes the opportunity to work alongside a cashier, two chefs and a forklift operator to find out what state his business is in.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups? After raising two tweenagers, Sheryl and Frank are ready to move out of their starter property and find a forever home at last. But this time, the renovations may be the least of the brothers problems. Instead, getting Frank to trust them proves to be as tough as nails.Short:Sheryl and Frank are ready to find a forever home. But the renovations may be the least of the brothers problems. Instead, earning Franks trust proves to be as tough as nails

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Newcastle-upon-Tyne, ship workers Laura and her fiance Kevin launch the contest with their Scottish-themed menu. Competitive couple JP and Kayley have mixed feelings, and young professionals Jamie and Georgi think steak and chips is too basic. Jamie and Georgi host next and go all out with their fancy food - but are convinced JP and Kayley are out to sabotage their dishes. Finally, its the turn of cake shop owners Kayley and JP, who shock Jamie and Georgi with the standard of their food

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples based in Manchester take part in the dinner party competition. First up are Raf and Kevin with their healthy menu - unless you include the chocolate cake for dessert, that is. Their flamboyant apartment impresses Chantel and Stephen, but American Matthew seems less impressed. Day two sees Chantel and Stephen hosting a backyard party, while expectations are high on the final evening as food connoisseur Matthew and his wife Jane present an Asian-inspired menu

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be and survival enthusiast Tom plans an outdoor wedding on a remote Scottish island, and wants to put his survival skills to the test with a woodland ceremony and a rugged reception. However, his future bride Sue dreams of a traditional wedding day in a stately home

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be David plans a dance flash mob wedding in a shopping centre in front of hundreds of people for his fiancee Kelly. Her dreams of becoming a dancer were cut short by illness, so David wants to celebrate the passion she had to give up by putting her at the centre of attention. However, the bride-to-be wants a small intimate wedding where she can forget about her condition

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Recording artist Darius Rucker goes undercover to find Americas next great musical act. Darius first gained fame as lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist of rock band Hootie and the Blowfish, selling over 16 million records and winning two Grammys. He then went on to have a successful solo career as a county music artist. Now Darius wants to find talented but undiscovered new music acts and help launch their careers, so dons a disguise to work at an open mic night, as a roadie and a busker in his efforts to locate fresh songwriting and performing talent

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Marcus Samuelsson goes undercover to find and mentor Americas next great chef. An Ethiopian refugee adopted by a Swedish family, Marcus developed a deep love for cooking at an early age and has since become a renowned force in international cuisine, with over 30 restaurants worldwide. Marcus disguises himself to work incognito in a teaching kitchen, a food truck business, a culinary institute and a soup kitchen, as he searches for undiscovered chefs to mentor

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a years worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw ups? David and Siobhan are ready to create a bidding war in their citys red-hot real estate. But first, they need the brothers to work their magic. What tricks do Jonathan and Drew have up their sleeves to secure a sale and land the couple their perfect property in one of the most expensive neighbourhoods in town?Short:David and Siobhan keep getting outbid in their citys intense market. What tricks do Jonathan and Drew have up their sleeves to secure a sale and land the couple a perfect property?

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts and regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate Alan Carr and Harriet Kemsley play against Jonathan Ross and Maisie Adam. Huge Davies is in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark invites his parents over for Christmas lunch, and plans everything down to the last detail - but Jeremy becomes over-excited, then Dobby and Super Hans turn up uninvited. Comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: A month after asking Dobby to move in with him, Mark is still waiting for Jeremy to leave and is becoming increasingly jealous of his girlfriends visits to the permanently ill Gerrard. Comedy starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell, with Isy Suttie and Jim Howick

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Karen Freeman-Wilson, the Mayor of Gary, Indiana, aims to reverse her citys economic decline and population loss. She dons a disguise to meet the citys workforce, including a sanitation plant operator, a fire fighter, a police officer and a beach maintenance worker

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A trio of couples compete to be the best dinner party hosts in Coventry, beginning with joker Neal and his level-headed wife Hazel, who let themselves down with a few cooking errors. Ed and Jess keep things simple on day two, although a secret from Neals past has the diners in hysterics, before Emma and Huseyin round the contest off with a Turkish menu

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Car mad groom-to-be Adam brings the two loves of his life together, by organising a wedding ceremony for his fiancee Victoria in the middle of a car show. However, the bride-to-be has always pictured a wedding day steeped in romance and gothic grandeur, and there is the possibility that Adams car will not make it to the ceremony without breaking down

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Kyle plans a demolition derby style wedding, complete with an old banger, a race track, and a rented wedding dress. However, his fiancee Katie dreams of the exact opposite - she wants a traditional affair with a perfect dress to match

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: YouTube star and internet sensation Bethany Mota goes undercover to meet up-and-coming social media hopefuls who are trying to break through. Disguised as an ordinary girl with a punk rock style who dreams of starting her own channel, Bethany meets a world champion beat-boxer, a pair of comical twin pranksters and an inspiring hip hop dance teacher. In the end, Bethany reveals her true identity in a surprising way and helps make their dreams come true

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: American football and baseball star Deion Sanders goes undercover to meet inspiring sports coaches and deserving fans. In the end, Deion reveals his true identity to reward their generosity and help turn their dreams into reality

When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Thirty four-year-old Dan, a construction manager from Essex putting a broken engagement behind him. He is partnered with 35-year-old Jess, a personal trainer whose love life is in need of a good workout. Twenty-five-year-old Emily from Leeds boasts a masters degree in law. Her date is rom-com-loving Yorkshire lad Ryan. Carpet salesman Nathan, 28, has been round the block and back again in his home town of Burnley. But he is here to turn over a new leaf. His date is retail assistant Chloe, 23, a Lancashire woman who hates a pushover and is looking for a man to challenge her

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before its too late

programme.desc: Once again, maître d Fred Sirieix plays Cupid at the Manchester restaurant. First to arrive is 36-year-old, larger-than-life stand-up comedian Mani. Despite his confidence on stage, hes yet to find a strong, independent Pakistani Muslim woman he can settle down with off stage. His match is 30-year-old nursing home owner Natasha, whose quick wit and dry sense of humour seem set to give Mani a run for his money. Twenty nine-year-old hairdresser Scott has a history of relationships being cut short. Hes paired with gentle giant and self-confessed Nintendo geek Lewis, who wonders if his love of computer games is the thing thats keeping him single

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: It is a recipe showdown as Ree shares awesome football food inspired by her college rival daughters

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates a fresh spin on a fast-food favourite, preparing a bucket of fried chicken with rainbow slaw, sweet sticky potato wedges and charred corn on the cob, and he makes enough to feed a family of four for less than £10. The chef also shares tips on getting crispy chicken skin without having to deep-fry, and rustles up spiced sausage bake, garlic bread and a meat-free roast, as well as two very different recipes for leftover salmon

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Only four bakers remain as the semi-final arrives. This week, the contestants must demonstrate their mastery of patisserie in three more challenges. However, the stakes have never been higher, and a disaster in any one of the rounds might mean the difference between claiming a place in the final, or bowing out early. In the Signature, the bakers must achieve perfect lamination on French pastries, and in the Technical, Paul Hollywood puts the amateurs through their paces with a yeast-based cake with a fruity top and delicate chocolate work. For the showstopper finale, the competitors face a multiple mini-cake bake, with Paul and fellow judge Mary Berry expecting a high-end finish that demonstrates the bakers ability to manage their time

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present this years grand final, as the three remaining bakers compete to impress judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood and take home the trophy for 2016 . For the final three challenges, they must prepare perfect meringues and are set a seemingly simple technical task with a twist - the recipe only includes one instruction. Finally, they must prove their worth in the most complex showstopper ever featured on the show

programme.desc: Ina shakes things up with skillet-roasted lemon chicken with roasted broccolini, then follows with raspberry rhubarb crostata with ice cream for dessert

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: From 2011, 12 enthusiastic home-cooks take part in a culinary contest devised by Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry to determine which of them is Britains best amateur baker. In the first round, the competitors are challenged to make 24 decorated cupcakes in two hours, before being asked to bake a coffee and walnut Battenberg cake. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 11 remaining bakers are given the task of creating a quiche that reflects their personalities, before tackling the technical challenge - tarte au citron. The pressure proves too much for some, as they try to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martin: Delicious
programme.desc: The chef visits a grower of asparagus, combines the vegetable with poached egg, chargrills it with red pepper and makes a tart

programme.title: James Martin: Delicious
programme.desc: The chef prepares chick pea and spinach tapas, charred tuna romesco and Iberian ham salad

programme.title: James Martin: Delicious
programme.desc: The chef prepares cheese with roast figs and prosciutto, and a classic Greek salad

programme.title: James Martin: Delicious
programme.desc: The chef prepares smoked trout salad and hot tea-smoked trout with celeriac remoulade. He also tries his hand at fly fishing for trout on the River Test in Hampshire

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: Rick explores the gastronomic delights of Ireland, paying a return visit to Corks English Market. He goes on to taste soda bread straight from the oven, before cooking classic Irish recipes such as beef and oyster pie with Guinness, and corned beef with cabbage

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: Rick meets the Nute family of Tintagel, who grow potatoes the old-fashioned way, and samples a few tipples at the Newton Abbot Beer Festival. Then its on to Yorkshire, where he samples award-winning herbs cultivated by Jekka McVicar, before heading for Cornwalls Cadgwith Cove

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummonds sharing recipes from her pizza place in town, as she makes foolproof pizza dough, garlic butter and a no-cook pizza sauce

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: The Drummond family throw a farewell dinner for college-bound cousins Paige and Caleb, and Ree prepares grilled rib eye steak and brown butter mashed potatoes

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver rustles up piri piri pork belly with crispy crackling, frugal hangover noodles topped with Asian-style crispy and runny fried egg, and two very different ideas for making the most of leftover lamb from a roast - a biryani and a crunchy noodle salad. Plus, a midweek showstopper in the form of Jamies grilled garlic mussels with sweet tomato soup, at just £1.30 a portion, and tips on how to use inexpensive frozen vegetables

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Gartens husband, Jeffrey, takes a pizza making class and learns to make a white pizza, while Ina prepares a platter of rocket with prosciutto and burrata

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.sub-title: Cooking for Jeffrey: It Must be Friday
programme.desc: Ina shakes things up with skillet-roasted lemon chicken with roasted broccolini, then follows with raspberry rhubarb crostata with ice cream for dessert

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 11 remaining bakers are given the task of creating a quiche that reflects their personalities, before tackling the technical challenge - tarte au citron. The pressure proves too much for some, as they try to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by fellow chef Tony Singh for a tour of the Isle of Skye. Tony begins by visiting a local bakery that doubles as an art gallery. He also learns how to make the local oatcakes. James, meanwhile, is inspired by the seafood to cook a dish using plaice and lovage. The duo then take a boat trip, where they go dolphin spotting, and James cooks up a fresh lobster and langoustine dish with an added Scottish twist

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James visits the Shetland Islands, an area of natural beauty that hes always wanted to see. He gets to hire a vintage car to explore the area, where he learns about traditional fish salting and cooks a tasty vegetable curry at a local social enterprise project. Later on, James learns all about Shetland community spirit and cake at one of their famous Sunday teas, and finally cooks up a Shetland-inspired paella on a beautiful local beach

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: You Can Only Get It Here

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a barbecue joint in Virginia Beach that served burnt ends on a bun with homemade rub and smokey sauce. Plus he samples hand rolled tortillas in San Antonio, Texas

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.desc: Fact-based drama, chronicling the rising tensions between British colonial forces and Zulu tribes in 1879, culminating in the massacre at Isandlwana in which more than 1,500 British soldiers died shortly before the attack on Rorkes Drift. Prequel to Zulu, starring Burt Lancaster, Peter OToole, Denholm Elliott, John Mills, Simon Ward and Nigel Davenport

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A landing party beams down to a replica Earth inhabited by children whose parents were wiped out by a mysterious plague, and Captain Kirk is forced to find a cure before the Enterprise crew is infected. William Shatner stars

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A young woman with ESP abilities helps Steve search the Everglades for a missing scientist. Fantasy adventure, starring Lee Majors and Pamela Franklin

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy agrees to act as a decoy and puts her life on the line in the course of duty. Eighties police drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team tries to provide the evidence needed to convict a serial killer but faces a series of challenges and struggles to reach the courtroom in time

programme.title: Equilibrium (2002)
programme.desc: In a future world, emotions are outlawed, with the population kept under control with compulsory use of sedatives, ruthlessly enforced by gun-toting clerics. When one of these law enforcers stops taking his own drugs, he falls in with an underground group of rebels fighting to overthrow the system. Sci-fi adventure, starring Christian Bale, Emily Watson, Taye Diggs, Angus MacFadyen and Sean Bean

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation (2018)
programme.desc: After winning a fight in Las Vegas, Kurt Sloane is sedated and taken to a prison in Bangkok, where hes forced to fight a formidable opponent for his freedom. Action sequel, starring Alain Moussi, Sara Malakul Lane and Maxime Savaria

programme.title: Code Name: Geronimo (2012)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the 2011 American attack on Osama Bin Ladens compound in Pakistan, which resulted in the death of the terrorist leader. Six soldiers are recruited by the CIA for this secret assignment, but as they undergo training for the mission, their target is kept a secret from them. Starring William Fichtner and Cam Gigandet

programme.title: Beware My Brethren (1972)
programme.desc: A journalist finds herself in danger when she infiltrates a sinister religious cult - especially when she suspects that one members homicidal tendencies have found an outlet in slaughtering unfortunate sinners to save their souls. Thriller, starring Tony Beckley, Suzanna Leigh, Ann Todd, Patrick Magee and Percy Herbert

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team tries to provide the evidence needed to convict a serial killer but faces a series of challenges and struggles to reach the courtroom in time

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy agrees to act as a decoy and puts her life on the line in the course of duty. Eighties police drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A young woman with ESP abilities helps Steve search the Everglades for a missing scientist. Fantasy adventure, starring Lee Majors and Pamela Franklin

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: Ride in the Whirlwind (1965)
programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for outlaws, find themselves pursued by a relentless posse. Western, written, starring and co-produced by Jack Nicholson, with Cameron Mitchell and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Gone to Texas (1986)
programme.desc: Fact-based Western telling the story of the general and politician Sam Houston. While Texas was under Mexican rule, he became a leading figure in the fight for independence, ultimately rising to become commander in chief of the regions armies which he led to a decisive final victory at the battle of San Jacinto. Starring Sam Elliott, Claudia Christian and Michael Beck

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A deranged psychiatrist from the Tantalus Penal Colony smuggles himself aboard the USS Enterprise, prompting McCoy and Kirk to investigate the prisons director, who is using a sinister device to control the minds of inmates and staff. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: The bionic hero faces a killer robot. Action adventure, starring Lee Majors, Richard Anderson and John Saxon

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The dedicated police officer faces a conflict of interests while tracking a gang of thieves who successfully emptied the contents of an armoured car. Can he bring them to justice without compromising his efforts to help the sister of one of the suspects? Drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walkers two-star rookies must track down a terrorist who threatens to unleash a deadly bioweapon on the city if the authorities do not meet his demands within 48 hours

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro (1998)
programme.desc: The sword-wielding saviour of Spanish California returns after 20 years in prison, tutoring a thief to take over his heroic role and tackle corrupt government officials, who are using slave labour to mine gold illegally. Both mentor and pupil have personal scores to settle with their enemies, led by a ruthless governor and a psychotic military officer. Swashbuckling adventure, with Anthony Hopkins, Antonio Banderas and Catherine Zeta-Jones.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration (2009)
programme.desc: A dead soldier who was brought back to life as the ultimate killing machine is revived once more to deal with terrorists who have taken control of a nuclear reactor. He finds his enemies not only have a more advanced reanimated soldier in their ranks, but they have also resurrected an old foe of his. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme and Dolph Lundgren

programme.title: Anti-Life (2020)
programme.desc: A junior mechanic aboard a interstellar ship, en route to a new planet, must outwit a cosmic terror intent on using the spaceship as a weapon. Action sci-fi, starring Bruce Willis, Cody Kearsley, Rachel Nichols, Kassandra Clementi and Johnny Messner

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers (1956)
programme.desc: A small California town is infiltrated by sinister alien vegetable pods from outer space, which start to clone the residents and replace them with emotionless replicas. A local doctor realises something bizarre is going on and sets out to investigate - but is not prepared for what he finds. Don Siegels sci-fi thriller, with Kevin McCarthy, Dana Wynter and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Keen young rugby player Robert has a dangerously high heart rate and may need to have a pacemaker fitted - a scary thought for the nine-year-olds father. Mark, 32, has fallen 30ft from scaffolding while doing some DIY, and theres concern he may have damaged his spine. Christine, 74, arrives in AandE after an accident in her garden, and shes suffered nasty injuries to her face

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Malcolm, who has had a cardiac arrest, is put under emergency anaesthetic on the hospital helipad. Helicopter medics rush to help elderly driver Bill after his car flips in Whitley Bay. In Oxfordshire, a sidecar race comes to an abrupt end for brothers Paul and Shane

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Pub landlord Tony is brought in with burnt legs as a result of his barbecue gas cylinder exploding - made slightly worse by the fact he was only wearing boxer shorts at the time. Henry, a 93-year-old war veteran, is rushed in with severe breathing difficulties, and builder Bill was knocked unconscious after falling off his shed. His CT scan reveals he has broken his neck in three places, and he may need surgery to avoid damage to his spinal cord

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Zaki, 63, recently underwent a tonsillectomy following a diagnosis of throat cancer, but he has come to AandE after suffering a serious bleed. Doctors try to save 10-month-old baby Amy, who stopped breathing at home, while 21-year-old expectant father Craig appears to have had a miraculous escape after a motocross accident, but has he learnt his lesson?

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.sub-title: Earl Grey Tea, Oysters, Clotted Cream
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty heading to southern Italy to find out where the flavour comes from in his Earl Grey tea. Kate Quilton wants to know if it is true that oysters can be eaten all year round, or whether they should be avoided in the summer months, while Matt Tebbutt is in Cornwall to learn what gives clotted cream its distinctive yellow colour

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo head for Crewe to meet rock n roller Billy, who lives in a house that is frozen in time in the 1950s

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Maidenhead, Berkshire, Simon OBrien falls in love with an old ships carpenters chest, while Henry Cole takes away a miniature tether car, which he hopes to get moving again

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon White and Shirley Boyle, owners of the Old Hall Country House in Madeley, Cheshire, host the weeks first round of the BandB competition. The guests are impressed by the 16th-century building, and are taken tap-dancing and to a private fine-dining restaurant, but one of them is dissatisfied with her bedrooms layout and the garnish on her eggs at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eileen Finn invites her fellow contestants to the four-star Thornley House in Allendale, Northumberland, for the second round of the contest, but struggles to follow the impressive first event. The hostesss pet cats are not to all of her guests liking, and with activities including a tour of a feline cemetery, the theme for the stay is made abundantly clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jessica and Adrian Rashleigh are the third hosts, at their three-bedroom establishment Chy Conyn in St Ives, Cornwall. For the activity they arrange a magical mystery camper van tour of the local sights. Some of the guests struggle with the small breakfast room but the food is a success, and Eileen Finn demonstrates her karate skills on the men

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the Cavendish in Bournemouth, run by Tim and Karen Sturgess. On arrival, the competitors are impressed by the pink palace, but things go downhill when a bed is broken and one couple are allocated a room next to the front door. However, Eileen is delighted by the feline memorabilia in her room and the group enjoys a spot of indoor paint-balling and an open-top bus tour of the resort

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Simon White of Old Hall Country House is surprised by an overpayment and Eileen Finn from the four-star Thornley receives tough criticism, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time social worker Sara hosts the first dinner party from in and around Cumbria, hoping to impress with a menu of Middle Eastern cuisine in homage to her birthplace of Baghdad

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bricklayer Dale prepares an evening of construction-themed comfort food, including a Great Wall of Chinese Chicken, and Ashs flippant remarks get him in trouble

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Council refuse worker Vicki hosts the third dinner party of the week in and around Cumbria, hoping to impress her guests with an unusual hospital-themed menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Horse-riding hospitality entrepreneur Ash hosts the penultimate party in Cumbria and chooses a menu of personal favourites, including king prawn pil pil, hoping to scoop the £1,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition in and around Cumbria sees 50-year-old property developer Rob treat his guests to the delights of some local produce in an attempt to win the £1,000 prize. Vicki is horrified when he serves Cumberland sausage and black pudding for his starter, while Sara isnt happy with her poached egg and Vicki finds eggshell in hers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Spain, where Ben Eyre and Anna Chalu are first to host at Vista Del Torcal in the Andalusian Mountains. Despite being impressed with their rooms, some guests are less enthused by an afternoon of rock climbing, leaving Ben and Anna hoping a full English breakfast will save their bacon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jed and Mandy Filmer welcome their rivals to the Hotel la Tartana on Spains Costa Tropical, and hope to impress them with a cookery class - not realising one of their guests is a qualified chef. A revelation at dinner stuns the group, before the Filmers attitude to breakfast service jeopardises their chances of victory

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julia Grant hosts the third round of the competition in Spain at her Benidorm BandB The Queens Hotel. Her guests are not impressed with her standards of cleanliness, finding dirt, dust and hairs, and tensions rise at dinner over her straight-friendly label. The owner improves the evening by giving everyone a drag makeover and persuading them to perform in a revue, but some of the feedback she receives leaves her enraged

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final hosts in Spain are Alastair Smith and Martyn Watson, owners of the gay and naturist-friendly Almond Tree Villa in Murcia. The days activity is olive picking, but the mood turns sour when Jed admits he gave Julias hotel low marks, while a disaster in the bathroom and a sugar-rich continental breakfast reflect badly on Alastair and Martyns feedback scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants of the Spanish special meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples who struggled to find their first marital home, including Rupreet and Sundeep who had their hearts set on a specific area in Harrow. Phil also revisits Paul and Elly, who searched for a property in Bristol, to see if they found the perfect house

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil return to Edinburgh to visit Gary and Bill, after meeting them in 2020 to help them choose between to selling or renovating their house, to see what they decided. While Gary was packed and ready to move out of their four-bed Victorian cemetery lodge, Bill loved the unique features of their home and so the pair enlisted Kirstie and Phils help

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Adam and Tassy take on an abandoned water tower - a concrete column stretching over 20 metres into the Northamptonshire sky - and turn it into a fun family home. Their radical design includes a concrete interior with curved walls, slides, secret rooms, a firemans pole and - up in the tank itself - a swimming pool and a sky garden. The plan is to sell their terraced house and get a mortgage to raise £400,000 and do most of the conversion work themselves - even though they have two young children already and a third on the way. Its wildly ambitious and gets off to a slow start when a steel reinforced floor takes forever to excavate, and they have to build a sound wall to reduce the hum from a nearby electricity substation. As concrete pours, their walls start to leak and it looks like their water tower doesnt want to be lived in without a concrete-soaked battle of biblical proportions

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St Georges for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into AandE after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Betting shop owner Les, 40, is rushed to St Georges after losing control of his car on a country road on his way to work. Cambelle, a 21-year-old plumber, has an infected cyst that may require surgery, while 67-year-old retired doctor Patrick is brought to AandE following a horse-riding accident in which he was dragged 130ft and not found for more than two hours

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew battles bad weather in Cumbria to reach injured 70-year-old hill-walker Jenny, while Scotts attempts at DIY land him in serious trouble, and biker Ronald needs urgent treatment after a crash

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of teenage mountain biker Steven, a multi-vehicle collision in Bedford leaves 32-year-old Ashley with potentially life-changing injuries, and Nicola steps in to save her husband Michaels life when he has a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St Georges for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into AandE after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. In Israel, Kate unearths the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery. In Iceland, Jimmy investigates Skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product, and in Cornwall, Matt dives for edible seaweed that has started cropping up on supermarket shelves

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon OBrien are in Woking, Surrey, where they find a sidecar - to be transformed into a boat - and a water cylinder that Simon might make into a trendy lamp

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another quartet of BandB owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire. The couple get a frosty response when one guest learns her hosts do not live on-site, while another is left in hysterics by an unexpected discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group sets off for Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue Dodds dog-friendly Seashells Guesthouse. Spirits run high with a trip to the beach and a game of bingo, but Nancys complaints over dog hairs on the sheets and smoking in the rooms bring down the light-hearted mood during dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: American ex-banker Nancy Hampson hosts at the Old Court Guesthouse in Bath, but her vocal criticisms of the weeks first two establishments have made her no friends among her fellow competitors. Paul Billington is annoyed that the bed he and wife Flora Loizou are given is not big enough, but is more impressed when taken for food at a quirky local restaurant

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay with Caroline Scott, the owner of the Dean BandB near Longniddry, East Lothian The picturesque house and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth win everyone over, but underwear in the drawers, cobwebs on the curtains and a messy breakfast service seriously hamper the hosts chances of success

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Sue from Seashells in Great Yarmouth confronts Nancy Hampson about the controversial topic of smoking in bedrooms, while Paul Billington and Flora Loizou are held to account about their low mark for the Old Court Guesthouse

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bargain-hunter Heidi hosts the first of five dinner parties in Hertfordshire, hoping her adventurous Asian menu will impress set her on the way to the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the second night from Hertfordshire, bank clerk Sylvia hosts a 1980s-themed evening featuring a menu of Spanish cuisine and a show-stopping tribute to Madonna

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Showbiz journalist Benji hosts the third dinner party of the week in Hertfordshire, hoping to impress his guests with a Gran Canaria-themed night featuring airline-inspired dishes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Hertfordshire, childrens nurse and guide leader Nicky, plans a menu inspired by her dream visit to Asia, with complicated home cooking and geographical grub

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Hertfordshire, party-loving Mark hosts a Greek evening, with saganaki and lamb kleftiko on the menu. Marks kept his cards close to his chest all week, so his guests are keen to find out more about him, on a night that ends with an action-packed obstacle course around his kitchen, and an emotional moment at the dinner table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.sub-title: The Kings Head and Queens Jules
programme.desc: Tim and Jules Anderson are first to host at the Kings Head and Queens Jules in Suffolk, where they provide their guests with a lesson in how to fillet fish, and an evening of karaoke. However, the owners find criticism hard to take the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Blossom welcome their rivals to the Hotel Continental in Harwich, Essex, where they are greeted by an erotic art display. The guests enjoy participating in a poetry reading during the afternoon, each writing their own piece, but the mornings breakfast goes awry after the hosts have a disagreement

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ryan Davies has to deal with a crisis when the contestants stay his five-star BandB Llanerch Vineyard in south Wales, but still manages to impress with his location and selection of wines. However, Gordon and Blossom go on a fault-finding mission and leave feedback the host is not happy with

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Tracy Bullows, owners of the Whitehall Hotel in Darwen, Lancashire, play host to the last night of the weeks competition. Hoping to impress with a mix of professionalism and efficiency, they decide to take their guests on a tour of a local paint factory, but tempers fray and a stony silence follows at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two young couples who were looking to take their all-important first steps on the property ladder in London. First, Phil meets Cat and Ed, who were searching for a home in the area around Chiswick, before revisiting Ian and Sarah, who were in love with the idea of finding a property in Balham

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lucy and Lynton in East Grinstead, West Sussex, who are unsure whether to sell their home or renovate instead. Lucy is set on staying where they are as its the first place she has owned, but Lynton finds the house claustrophobic, and longs to find a new home they could fall in love with

programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: Documentary following the route of the train from London to Istanbul, charting the history of the Orient Express and examining how Europe has changed over the past 150 years. In the opening edition, the train rolls out and heads east, past the home of a forgotten villain whose fortunes were transformed by his journeys on the Orient Express. In Paris, theres a trip to the Moulin Rouge for a memorable night at the birthplace of the high-kicking can-can dance

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. Shes sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries

programme.title: Four in a Bed

The owner improves the evening by giving everyone a drag makeover and persuading them to perform in a revue, but some of the feedback she receives leaves her enraged

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil return to Edinburgh to visit Gary and Bill, after meeting them in 2020 to help them choose between to selling or renovating their house, to see what they decided. While Gary was packed and ready to move out of their four-bed Victorian cemetery lodge, Bill loved the unique features of their home and so the pair enlisted Kirstie and Phils help

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Adam and Tassy take on an abandoned water tower - a concrete column stretching over 20 metres into the Northamptonshire sky - and turn it into a fun family home. Their radical design includes a concrete interior with curved walls, slides, secret rooms, a firemans pole and - up in the tank itself - a swimming pool and a sky garden. The plan is to sell their terraced house and get a mortgage to raise £400,000 and do most of the conversion work themselves - even though they have two young children already and a third on the way. Its wildly ambitious and gets off to a slow start when a steel reinforced floor takes forever to excavate, and they have to build a sound wall to reduce the hum from a nearby electricity substation. As concrete pours, their walls start to leak and it looks like their water tower doesnt want to be lived in without a concrete-soaked battle of biblical proportions

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into AandE after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.sub-title: Islands of the Forth: Fortress Islands of the Forth
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island-hopping odyssey, exploring the islands scattered in the Firth of Forth. He discovers these seemingly peaceful islands have a dramatic history of warfare, from medieval English raids on Inchcolm to the first air-raid attack on Britain above Inchgarvie. Paul learns about the strategic importance of Inchkeiths defences during two world wars before heading to the Bass Rock to learn more about the history of prisoners incarcerated on the island, with 160,000 gannets for company

programme.desc: The case of family man Richard Arenas, who was gunned down in broad daylight. With no apparent motive or witnesses, investigators tried to track down his killer on CCTV

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: How a drug-dependent landlady killed and buried seven victims for their social security cheques. Plus, a serial murderer is convicted on the basis of DNA evidence, 12 years after committing the crime

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The 2014 murder of Jessica Padgett, who was last seen on surveillance cameras driving into a car parking space and walking down an alley

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: The case of Californian teacher Laci Peterson, who disappeared in December 2002 while eight months pregnant with her first child. Her husband Scott claimed he last saw her before he went fishing - but his secret mistress exposed his lies. Experts examine his behaviour

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Roger Harris and his wife Donna built their dream home in Florida, but just after the birth of their second son, a vile secret threatens their sweet, simple life

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: Evil Lives Here

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: A case in which a couple realised their son was hiding an evil secret. George and Margaret Keller were forced to make a heartbreaking choice whether or not to betray their child

programme.desc: Tyre marks and fibres snare a murderer who stabbed two women, and a man stages an accident to kill his wife

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 1
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott hit the road again, winding each other up, cracking bad jokes and looking for exquisite antiques, beginning in north Wales. Raj also heads for a remote but stunning stretch of Welsh coastline to discover how the national language was brought close to extinction before becoming a defining feature of modern Wales

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nick Clare and his daughter Vicky deliver a fragile violin, hoping stringed instrument expert Becky Loughton can restore harmony to this treasured keepsake. programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus helps to clear a warehouse filled with collectables to fund a luxury holiday. Plus, a pensioner sells his huge model railway

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow the story of reunited siblings Geoffrey Tonks and Barbara Jacobs as they investigate a family mystery and try to trace a missing sister on Geoffreys fathers side. They also catch up with Robert Lindsay, who explores the difficulties of building a father/son relationship so late in life, and brother and sister Nicholas Rhoades and Cayley Cox talk about how they have already experienced an enormous amount together in the year that has passed since they met for the first time

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow three stories of sons coming to terms with the past, including Marc Wolfes struggle to form a bond with his birth mother Esther, who lives in New Zealand. However, his search for identity didnt end there as researchers were able to reunite him with his birth father David, and the pair have grown close. One significant hurdle remained in the form of introducing David to his adoptive father Terry, and cameras were there as Marc introduces his two dads to each other

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus discovers fairground items and a 1920s Ford Model T. Then, he helps a man clear the once-treasured possessions of his late parents

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House

programme.desc: Rare silver asparagus serving tongs and an African birthing chair are among the items bought by Charles Hanson and Raj Bisram as they continue their shopping tour of Wales

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Comedian Chris Ramsey researches his family tree, starting by investigating his great grandfather who fought in the First World War. A trip to the military base in Dorset where he trained, reveals he fought at Gallipoli, one of the deadliest campaigns of the conflict. Tracing back to the late 18th century, Chris revisits the era when his five-times great grandmother was pregnant. This was a time when those lucky enough to pass a rigorous interview and then win a lottery were able to give birth at the British Lying-In Hospital, thus helping ensure their children got a better start in life. Narrated by Phil Davis

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Match of the Day host Gary Lineker studies the life of his great-great-great-grandfather James Pratt, discovering he was a poacher in Victorian England and served time in Leicester Prison. Gary wants to find out why his ancestor became a repeat offender, and also get to the bottom of how Thomas Billingham, a forebear who was the son of an illiterate gardener, ended up as a highly skilled legal clerk

programme.title: Donals Real Time Recipes
programme.desc: Donal Skehan demonstrates how to cook signature, no-fuss recipes for busy weeknights, proving that dinner doesnt need to be complicated. The series comes hand-in-hand with the chefs latest cookbook, featuring 90 family favourites in 30 minutes or less, from pasta heroes like chop tomato pesto pasta and spicy nduja carbonara to one-pot wonders like saffron chicken and rice

programme.title: How to Cook Well in Morocco
programme.desc: Rory OConnell journeys through Morocco and cooks dishes inspired by his travels, capturing the flavours of the North African country, back home in East Cork. The chef starts out in the city of Tangier and visits the fish market before cooking a fish tagine at the Blue Door Cuisine, a cookery school with an all female team which aims to promote cultural exchange through food

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: After 18 years in Aarons mothers house, Aileen and Aaron sell up to renovate a spacious Victorian townhouse in New Ross. However, a tight budget, DIY challenges, and the early return of Aarons mother Joan puts pressure on the project

programme.title: Obituary
programme.desc: Comedy drama, starring Siobhan Cullen and Michael Smiley. Elviras life spirals after the death of her father. As she grieves, Emerson, desperate to secure his future, strikes a secret deal with their ruthless new boss, Vivienne, for a shot at an editor job. Elviras own career is threatened by Ruby, a cunning intern who steals her stories and mocks Wards death

programme.title: Douglas Is Cancelled
programme.desc: TV news anchor Douglas Bellowes faces a career crisis when hes overheard making a sexist joke at a wedding. The situation escalates when his co-presenter, Madeline Crow, re-Tweets a comment about the incident to her large following, intensifying the public backlash. Douglas struggles to clear his name while navigating his own relationships with his wife and daughter. Comedy drama, starring Hugh Bonneville and Karen Gillan

programme.title: On the Beat

programme.title: The Last Irish Missionaries
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dearbhail McDonald and Bryan Dobson travel to Kenya and the Philippines to visit Irish priests, still active in the field in their eighties after decades of service. They also explore the long-term impact of the missionary movement, for better and for worse, and question what or who will replace the last Irish missionaries

programme.title: High Road, Low Road

programme.desc: Amanda Holden revamps the second guest bedroom, while Alan Carr gets handed the short straw - the windowless bathroom. programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football
programme.desc: Eoin Liston, David Clifford and Shane Walsh reveal the pleasures and pain of success. This edition takes a look at where the magic of feeling success comes from. Kieran Donaghy believes in flow, time standing still, and Juliet Murphy believes teamwork triumphed for Corks legendary women, who won 11 championships in 12 years

programme.title: Live UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: Bayern Munich v Real Madrid (Kick-off 8.00pm). Joanne Cantwell presents overage of the quarter-final second-leg tie at the Bernabeu. Madrid are unbeaten in their last four trips to this ground, with the most recent of those contests a 2-2 draw in the first leg of a semi-final in the 2023/24 competition, when Reals Brazilian start Vinicius Jr scored a brace, with Leroy Sane and Harry Kane finding the net for Bayern. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Vance prepares to host diplomatic talks with Venezuela, the team is called in to investigate the dead body of one of his inside men. venCrime drama, starring Sean Murray, Wilmer Valderrama and Katrina Law

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: With a crumbling outbuilding and an overgrown vine out of control, Amanda Holden and Alan Carr raise the curtain on their biggest challenge yet as they take on the BandBs courtyard. Amanda has an idea to transform the space into a romantic movie set. Alan, however, is unconvinced by his friends vision. The duo meet up with tour guide and friend Bernado at the spectacular gardens of the Alhambra Palace to learn what plants thrive in the Spanish sun. Amanda gets blown away by local builder Rafas mosaic-filled cave house and ropes him in to help design a masterpiece of her own

programme.title: Am I Being Unreasonable?
programme.desc: A revelation about Nic sends her spiralling into panic and causes shockwaves throughout her family and friends. Does this mean her worst fears have come true and shes ruined her sons life? Is everything unravelling or can she get away with murder?

programme.title: Shortland Street

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and Liam Charles present the semi-final, and in a first for the patisserie contest, the teams must create a plated dessert for each of the judges. With no recipe and just the ingredients and equipment before them, they draw on their experience to produce something that will hopefully stop Cherish Finden and Benoit Blin in their tracks. For the second challenge, they must create an edible table scene inspired by the land of the dinosaurs, with a large macaron cake at its heart

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Harrison Gardner gives advice to part-time teacher and mother of three Esther Foreman, who has no building experience but wants to construct the house of her dreams herself. With her partner Damien also helping out, the project starts to move along well, but as the seasons change its becomes clear this is no ordinary build as the sheer scale would be enough to scare off most people

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Robin tries to persuade the heavily pregnant Cherry to join him for a live-action, role-playing weekend, where everyone is to dress up as fantasy characters to drink mead and have sword fights in the woods. Rachel helps Sam prep for his potentially incredibly dangerous Duke of Edinburgh expedition, while Sue experiences difficulty opening a jar of gherkins

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Jack from Cork dreams of dating someone so good looking that people will assume he is very rich or very funny. Enter Marion from Limerick, who is so bad at dating that her friends have formed a group chat to vet her choices. Across the restaurant, retired business owner Garry is paired with glamorous divorcee Elizabeth, bubbly Amelia meets door-to-door salesman and serial extrovert Chris, and self-confessed daddys girl Eilish meets tractor-obsessed Adam, who bond over their shared love of machinery

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.sub-title: Ms De Brún and the Child of Prague
programme.desc: New English teacher Ms De Brún (Judith Roddy) arrives at Our Lady Immaculate and the friends immediately find themselves inspired. Meanwhile, Da Gerry attempts to take Ma Mary out on a date to the cinema, where things definitely dont go according to plan, and Sister Michael takes charge of a precious Child of Prague statue. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne ONeill and Siobhan McSweeney

programme.title: Ireland in Music
programme.desc: The country becomes a stage as Irelands finest musicians perform at the most beautiful and iconic places on the island, and catch up with presenter Denise Chaila. In the first show, Denise meets Dublin singer-songwriter David Kitt

programme.title: Making II
programme.desc: The second of a three-part series of documentary films by acclaimed filmmaker Pat Collins based on the annual Making In cultural event, which takes place each September at Joseph Walsh Studio in Fartha, County Cork. Featuring interviews and intimate conversations with a range of artists, architects, designers, musicians, sculptors and more, which highlight the dedication, devotion, and passion makers bring to their craft

programme.title: The Records Show
programme.desc: Katie Hannon explores Irelands national archives, before heading out across the country to follow the trail of the stories she finds there. Here she learns how a St Patricks Day tradition was born by accident, an inventor who promised to make Ireland a world leader in the energy industry and how the Queen of England was wined and dined

programme.title: Mancháns Europe by Train
programme.desc: Manchán Magan embarks on the final leg of his journey, travelling along the famed Riviera coastline by train, where he bumps into a French caricaturist who sketches his portrait in between stations. In the medieval village of Èze, he stops off at a perfume factory to create a scent that reminds him of his trip. Mancháns final night is spent in San Sebastien in Spains Basque region

programme.title: Christy Brown: Self Portrait
programme.desc: Saoirse Ronan brings Christy Browns poetry to life in this documentary that re-examines the legacy of the writer and painte. This programme explores the relationships and challenges that shaped his work, while drawing from Christys personal archive of letters, photographs and artwork. Featuring contributions from Jim Sheridan, John Banville and artist Mary Duffy. Narrated by Aidan Gillen

Across the restaurant, retired business owner Garry is paired with glamorous divorcee Elizabeth, bubbly Amelia meets door-to-door salesman and serial extrovert Chris, and self-confessed daddys girl Eilish meets tractor-obsessed Adam, who bond over their shared love of machinery

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Tempers flare and tension rises between Pembleton and Gee as they investigate a contentious case involving allegations of police brutality

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devons colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. programme.title: Exhibiting Forgiveness (2024)
programme.desc: An artists rise to success is scuppered by an unexpected visit from his estranged father, a recovering addict desperate to reconcile. Writer/director Titus Kaphars drama, starring Andre Holland and John Earl Jelks

programme.title: Aisha (2022)
programme.desc: While caught up in limbo for years in Irelands immigration system, Nigerian refugee Aisha Osagie develops a close relationship with former prisoner Conor Healy. However, their friendship soon comes under threat as Aishas future in Ireland is jeopardised. Drama, starring Letitia Wright, Josh OConnor and Ruth McCabe

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. The novice crooks thought they would be in and out in 10 minutes, but instead find themselves stuck in an ongoing hostage situation, with the police and the media laying siege to the bank. Sidney Lumets fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino, John Cazale and Charles Durning.

programme.title: Old Henry (2021)
programme.desc: A widowed farmer takes in a mysterious injured man carrying a satchel of cash, but when a posse comes for the money, he is forced to decide who to trust. Defending a siege, he then reveals a surprising gunslinging talent - calling his true identity into question. Western, starring Tim Blake Nelson, Scott Haze and Gavin Lewis

programme.title: A Star Is Born (2018)
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jacksons alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott

programme.title: Promising Young Woman (2020)
programme.desc: Medical-school dropout Cassie is traumatised by a tragic event in her past. Still living with her parents, and waiting tables at a cheap coffee shop to earn a living, she has found the perfect way to deal with the painful past, and seeks vengeance against those who crossed her path. Director Emerald Fennells Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppolas comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Gravity (2013)
programme.desc: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit above the Earth when the debris from an exploding satellite destroys their shuttle. Left drifting in space with no way to contact mission control, they begin a perilous journey to reach the safety of a space station before their oxygen supply runs out. Thriller, starring Sandra Bullock and George Clooney

programme.title: Captain Phillips (2013)
programme.desc: An American cargo ship sets a dangerous course around the coast of Somalia, while inland, four men are pressed into service as pirates by the local warlords. The captain is taken hostage when the raiding party hijacks the vessel, resulting in a tense five-day crisis. Fact-based thriller, starring Tom Hanks and Barkhad Abdi

programme.title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
programme.desc: A series of interlinked stories about the Los Angeles underworld. A hitman plays minder to his bosss wife, and he and his partner deal with a dead body following a mishap with a gun. Meanwhile, a washed-up boxer goes on the run after refusing to throw a fight, and two lovers plot a hold-up in a diner. Quentin Tarantinos crime drama, starring John Travolta, Samuel L Jackson, Uma Thurman, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Tim Roth and Amanda Plummer

programme.title: Concrete Utopia (2023)
programme.desc: The world has been reduced to rubble by a massive earthquake, and in the heart of Seoul there is only one rsediential building left standing - Hwang Gung Apartments. Outsiders start coming to the flats, and feeling a threat to their survival, the residents enact a special measure. South Korean drama with subtitles, starring Lee Byung-hun and Park Seo-joon

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. Western, starring James Stewart, Doug McClure, Rosemary Forsyth, Katharine Ross and Patrick Wayne

Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In (2024)
programme.desc: A youngster called Chan Lok-kwan accidentally enters the Walled City, discovers the order amidst its chaos, and learns important life lessons along the way. Chinese crime thriller with subtitles, starring Raymond Lam, Louis Koo and Sammo Hung

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Shenandoah (1965)
programme.desc: A Virginian farmer is left to raise seven children after his wife dies. He tries to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but when Union troops abduct his son, and his son-in-law enlists with the Confederates, he is unable to maintain his neutral stance and is dragged into the conflict. Western, starring James Stewart, Doug McClure, Rosemary Forsyth, Katharine Ross and Patrick Wayne

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
