programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: The Cinema List
programme.desc: A look at the some of the most notorious lawbreakers in film, from portrayals of ruthless crime bosses to true stories of thieves at large and smugglers on the run

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes on a four-day trek through the Kintail region of the north-western Highlands, examining the story of the Jacobite uprisings of the early 1700s along the way. He starts by visiting Iron Age dwellings in Shiel Bridge, and heads to the rebuilt castle on Eilean Donan, the original of which was destroyed after invading Spanish troops landed there and were attacked by British warships. Tony ends in Glen Shiel, the site of a climactic battle in 1719 where royalist troops defeated the rebels

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on expeditions through some of Britains most historic landscapes in search of the richest stories from the nations past. He begins with a 40-mile walk along the Derwent Valley in the Peak District, where the worlds industrial revolution was born. En route he visits the sleepy village of Cromford to find out about the work of entrepreneur Richard Arkwright, and stops off at a 900-year-old stately home that has been used as the location for three Jane Eyre films. Brian Blessed also introduces Tony to the joys - and the significance - of the Cromford canal, before this leg of his journey ends in Derby

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on a 45-mile hike through the countryside of the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the areas rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps him relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. From there, he travels up what used to be secret paths to Hever Castle and finds out how the monarchs reign brought not only huge social, political and industrial change, but also fame and disaster to the women who caught his eye He ends this leg of his journey in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions

programme.title: Troy Story
programme.desc: Part one of two. The legend of the Trojan War, a conflict between the ancient Greeks and the city of Troy, sparked by the abduction of Helen of Sparta by the Trojan prince Paris. In 1874, Heinrich Schliemann announced he had found Troy, setting in motion a golden age of archaeology where a lost Bronze Age world was also rediscovered. Since then, many archaeologists have challenged his claims, but in every generation new findings have kept the search for the city alive. This documentary brings the search up to date drawing upon 21st-century science and archaeology to pinpoint its location

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager at a new school befriends a pretty girl, but her ex-boyfriend is jealous and attacks him. During one particularly bad fight, a wise old caretaker intervenes and defeats the youngsters assailants using his martial arts skills. He goes on to mentor the boy and teach him karate so he can face his enemies in a tournament. Drama, with Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Elisabeth Shue

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager at a new school befriends a pretty girl, but her ex-boyfriend is jealous and attacks him. During one particularly bad fight, a wise old caretaker intervenes and defeats the youngsters assailants using his martial arts skills. He goes on to mentor the boy and teach him karate so he can face his enemies in a tournament. Drama, with Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Elisabeth Shue

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II (1986)
programme.desc: High-kicking teenager Daniel accompanies his venerable mentor Mr Miyagi when he returns to the Japanese province of Okinawa to visit his dying father. However, an old rival of Miyagis is waiting for them, while Daniel is drawn into a vicious conflict with their enemys own karate protege. Martial arts sequel, starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Yuji Okumoto

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III (1989)
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mothers infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fieldings novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Hugh Grant, Jim Broadbent and Gemma Jones

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Bridgets focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her babys father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging heros darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncles murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014)
programme.desc: The webslinging hero battles a powerful new enemy when a downtrodden engineer develops lethal electrical powers, which he unleashes on those he believes have betrayed him. As if that wasnt enough to keep him busy, he faces an even greater threat when he is reunited with an unstable old friend who has been charged with a sinister mission by his dying father, leading to a series of tense confrontations that threaten to change his life for ever. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx and Dane DeHaan

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II (1986)
programme.desc: High-kicking teenager Daniel accompanies his venerable mentor Mr Miyagi when he returns to the Japanese province of Okinawa to visit his dying father. However, an old rival of Miyagis is waiting for them, while Daniel is drawn into a vicious conflict with their enemys own karate protege. Martial arts sequel, starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Yuji Okumoto

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III (1989)
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: An American youngster goes to live in China with his mother, where he becomes an outsider and falls foul of the local bullies. He receives help from the kindly school caretaker, who turns out to be a kung fu master and offers to train the boy to defend himself. Martial arts drama, with Jaden Smith and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends (2025)
programme.desc: Kung fu prodigy Li Fong moves to New York City with his mother and befriends his classmate, Mia. But Connor Day, a local karate champion, provokes Li and publicly humiliates him. Li seeks guidance from his mentor, the kung fu master Mr Han, who reaches out to Daniel LaRusso, convincing the original Karate Kid to teach Li the principles of Miyagi Karate. Drama sequel, starring Jackie Chan, Ben Wang and Ralph Macchio

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012)
programme.desc: A gifted teenager investigates the secrets hidden in his dead parents past, leading him to a mysterious corporation and an incident that imbues him with superhuman powers. A personal tragedy drives him to use his new-found abilities to fight crime, and he is soon drawn into a deadly battle against a former colleague of his father, who has undergone a devastating transformation of his own. Superhero adventure reboot, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone and Rhys Ifans

programme.title: Zombieland (2009)
programme.desc: A mutated virus sweeps across America, turning most of the population into hideous flesh-eating zombies. A hard-drinking fearless adventurer leads a small band of young survivors on a perilous journey through the wasteland in search of a safe haven. Comedy horror, with Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg, Emma Stone and Abigail Breslin

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: An American youngster goes to live in China with his mother, where he becomes an outsider and falls foul of the local bullies. He receives help from the kindly school caretaker, who turns out to be a kung fu master and offers to train the boy to defend himself. Martial arts drama, with Jaden Smith and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete and Myka are sent to Philadelphia to find an artefact that is the cause of strange hallucinations, while Claudia takes a big risk by attempting to resurrect Steve. Sci-fi thriller, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Warehouses destruction, a pocket watch in Arties possession shows a countdown of 23 hours - giving the team almost a full day in which to find a time-travel device and avert the disaster. Clues found on the watch lead the crew to a heavily guarded Knights Templar stronghold in France. Sci-fi thriller, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Hershel and Glenn are trapped by foes both dead and alive following their altercation with two strangers, leading to a fierce shoot-out at the bar. Carol tries to stop Daryl withdrawing from the group, and Shane tries to rescue Lori, who has woken up in her overturned car - with two walkers attempting to get at her through the windscreen

programme.desc: While mourning the abrupt loss of Mike, Reginald and Maurice try to figure out Claires part in their fight. Uriel takes matters into his own hands

programme.desc: Hammond orders ONeill and the team to investigate a conspiracy theorist in Montana who claims he is an alien and in possession of a spaceship. While SG-1 is initially sceptical it begins to appear that there is some truth to his story. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate when a child goes missing, uncovering several similar cases all linked by sightings of a mysterious ghostly presence. It transpires that the Weeping Woman - or La Llorona - is a ghost who kidnaps three children every Halloween and drowns them, hoping their sacrifice can atone for the loss of her own children, whom she also drowned. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: After experiencing disturbing visions, Nick discovers a fellow Grimm is torturing and murdering monsters that have harmed humans, spreading panic among the Wesen creatures. Renard and Juliettes connection moves to the next level. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Shane take a blindfolded Randall 18 miles away from the farm, hoping to disorientate him enough that he and his fellow raiders will not cause any more trouble for the survivors. programme.desc: Sheldon joins Dr Linkletter and Dr Sturgis on a science road trip, while Georgie continues to lie about his age. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tries to put a stop to Leonards plan to be a sperm donor for her ex-boyfriend Zacks wife. Howard, Bernadette, Anu and Raj make the most of the latters cancelled stag party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out that Wil Wheaton is hosting a celebrity game of Dungeons and Dragons at his home, deception and betrayal become the order of the day as they compete to occupy the one open seat at the event. With guest appearance by William Shatner, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Kevin Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Bernadette go to San Diego for a pharmaceutical sales convention, leaving Howard in charge of the children. When Sheldon finds a book containing science experiments to carry out with children, the guys and Amy make a day of it, using little Michael and Halley as test subjects

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amys academic rivals embark on a publicity tour, so the couple try to get the Nobel laureates on their side. Halleys fear of the dark leads to opportunity and conflict for Howard, Bernadette and Stuart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a meltdown when she feels the pressure of what it would mean for women everywhere if she were to win a Nobel Prize. Raj and Howard attempt to relive the good old days when Howard buys a scooter that looks like the one he had years earller

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is worried that people wont take him seriously in his own field after publishing a paper that suggests he may have discovered alien life. Penny encourages Leonard to stand up for himself when he aims to become the principal investigator on a plasma physics study

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Barry Kripke finds proof that Dr Pemberton plagiarised his thesis in college, Sheldon and Amy arent sure whether they should turn their rival in or not. Howard is surprised but happy to learn that Bernadette wasnt the only waitress at The Cheesecake Factory who had a crush on him back in the day

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is pleasantly surprised when his mother Beverly arrives and is genuinely kind to him - until he finds out the real reason for her visit. Denise and Stuart overstay their welcome at Howard and Bernadettes. Christine Baranski guest stars

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Peggys childhood friend Kay comes to town, and gets on particularly well with Molly - who soon realises that her new best buddy is not too keen on sharing. Comedy, guest starring Kathy Bates

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: A weekend at the casino beckons for Molly and the girls, while Mike and Vince try to enjoy some college basketball when the guys come over to watch TV. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Carl, Mike and Samuel embark on a road trip to Memphis to meet Carls mother for the first time. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell, Reno Wilson and Nyambi Nyambi

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Suitcase Full of Cash and a Yellow Clown Car
programme.desc: Meemaws gambling room becomes a success, while Sheldon dips his toe in the stock market and Missy starts a business

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Solo Peanut, a Social Butterfly and the Truth
programme.desc: Georgie comes clean to Mandy, while Sheldon gets an odd request from old friend Paige, and George Sr and Mary are caught in the middle of Meemaw and Dales breakup

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Babies, Lies and a Resplendent Cannoli
programme.desc: Georgie struggles with his big secret, Sheldon copes with the death of a hero and Missy wants to babysit

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy stay up all night as they await a telephone call that could bring big news from the Nobel Committee - is everything in their lives about to change?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the US sitcom, theres an end and a beginning as the gang travel together into an uncharted future. Howard and Bernadette go away on a trip without their children for the first time, Leonard and Penny try to keep a secret, Sheldon and Amy stick together, and Raj makes a new friend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy about scientists and their friendship with a down-to-earth neighbour. When aspiring actress Penny moves into Leonards apartment block, he is immediately smitten, but Sheldon warns him that he runs the risk of a broken heart if he tries to woo her. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Gale, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset to learn Penny is dating someone, so his friends encourage him to seek a new romance by asking another woman out. Sara Gilbert appears alongside her Rosen co-star Johnny Gale

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is fired for being disrespectful to his boss, and explores new activities in a bid to find a purpose in life other than physics, but Leonard takes drastic action to restore him to his old self. Laurie Metcalf guest stars as Sheldons mother

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard fears he is wasting his time with Penny and ends up spending the night with fellow scientist Leslie. However, he is disappointed when she later tells him she was only interested in a one-night stand. Meanwhile, Sheldon frets over a change to his hamburger routine. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Pennys ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: The extreme sports-loving super spy is brought out of exile when a lethal gang of mercenaries steal a powerful new weapon that threatens the safety of the entire world. He must assemble his own team of adrenaline junkie agents to recover the lethal device. Action thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Donnie Yen, Toni Collette and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Firefighter and passionate cyclist Dave is concerned about a pilar cyst on his head that prevents him from wearing helmets.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Giant cauliflower-shaped bumps cover Elizabeths head. Jamaal has been growing a strange bump on the side of his backside since he was a boy

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Aimee has a mohawk of cysts on her head. Plus, Ediths face markings and itchy skin condition turn out to be more than she expected

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Since his mums death, Aarons lived at home to care for his elderly father. However, his food addiction could send him to an early grave unless he gets weight-loss surgery

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.desc: Victoria loves sparkle but doesnt want to be covered in glitter. Meanwhile, Bride Zahra craves an elaborate dress, but she will need a bigger budget

programme.title: Zeta One (1969)
programme.desc: Tongue-in-cheek Barbarella-style sci-fi caper. Amazonian space women invade Earth in search of a male to propagate their species. Contains nudity and 70s social attitudes.

programme.title: Musketeer
programme.desc: An old musketeer meets a youth and two scoundrels on the road to Paris. Short drama, starring Kevin McNally, Andrew Lewis and Charlie Allen

Plus a 1940s fly-o-plane fairground attraction that was once used to train fighter pilots

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.sub-title: Revisited: Yate, Stoke Gifford and Droitwich Spa
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock revisits a garden in Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, the team built four years earlier. Its owners, Emily and Jason, have carried on developing the garden, and Charlie is stunned to see its been turned it into an amazing cottage garden. She also catches up with the owners of the strangest garden the team have tackled - a pirate themed plot with its own sea monster and sees how one couple took the idea of a garden room to a whole new level

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team travel to Walsall to surprise young widow Nina Perrin Seedhouse. With three children under seven to look after, she does not have time for anything else, so her garden is a blank canvas. Its up to the green-fingered experts to finally realise the dream garden her husband was going to create for his family

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: The chef visits Kent, known as the Garden of England, and harvests cherries at a family run farm. From Ramsgate, he heads out to sea in search of Dover sole, and in Margate he celebrates artist JMW Turner and the British love of fish and chips. At home in Padstow, he makes red velvet chocolate and cherry cupcakes, and demonstartes a simple French dish called Dover sole à la meunière

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake some of the most perilous journeys in the world. Comedians Ed Byrne and Andy Parsons drive along Siberias M56 Kolyma highway, known as the Road of Bones. Along the way, they brave sub-zero temperatures, traverse icy routes, encounter deserted gulags and meet the locals who inhabit the frozen wilderness, but despite picking up practical tips for survival, the duo feel they are out of their depth

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: An RSPCA Special Ops team investigate an international criminal puppy farming operation, and Lancashire officers prosecute an owner for animal cruelty

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The Serious Fraud Office go undercover to investigate a suspect holiday home company offering exclusive residences in the Caribbean

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: In Melbourne, the busy SCT maintenance team expect the unexpected every day as they provision, inspect and shunt engines in and out of a bustling maintenance pit

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets chef Tom Adams, who runs Combeshead Farm, a leading field-to-fork restaurant where they grow and produce all of their own food, from sourdough bread to pork pies, as well as rearing a small herd of Mangalitsa pigs, a hairy, old-world breed that produces exquisite hams. Rick tries out a new recipe - pork chops with a sloe berry sauce - before moving on to the village of Rock, where his son Jack holds a clam bake on the shore of the Camel Estuary

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick discovers an unusual superstition and a rare type of Norman castle in Launceston, before meeting musicians Graham Fitkin and Ruth Wall in the far west of Cornwall

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Documentary with unrestricted access to Americas Customs and Border Protection working on the bridges that separate Texas and Mexico, following the work of the many officers who police the bridges and keep America safe. In the first episode, a shipment of cardboard packaging hides a deadly secret, and heroin disguised as a laptop baffles the worlds most advanced narcotic detection device

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers are suspicious when an elderly couple arrive from Mexico with five suitcases but no clothes, and a truck carrying garden furniture has something extra in the load

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorcycle racer heads to Colorado where he hopes to win one of Americas oldest races - the Pikes Peak International Hill Climb. In this annual contest, known as the Race to the Clouds, riders compete against the clock on a gruelling mountainside track that finishes more than 13,000ft above sea level. To learn the skills required in hill-climb events, Guy visits the birthplace of the sport - Shelsley Walsh in Worcestershire. Racing up the course in an F1-style car, he realises sheer horsepower and driving precision are vital, but he must also take a high-altitude fitness test in a hypoxic chamber to prepare for the challenge ahead

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are in Russia as the motoring magazine returns, taking part in a race across the urban landscape of St Petersburg. James defends the honour of the car in a very small Renault, Richard tries to prove that pedalling is faster by riding a bicycle, while Jeremy attempts to demonstrate that water is the quickest way across town by piloting a hovercraft. To make matters more complicated, all three presenters are racing not only one another but also the Stig, who is making his way toward the finish line by public transport. Plus, the new Lamborghini Huracan is put through its paces and singer-songwriter Ed Sheeran takes to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters embark on a road trip across Australias Northern Territory in fast, luxurious GT cars, with Jeremy Clarkson choosing a BMW M6 Gran Coupe, Richard Hammond picking a Bentley Continental GT V8 and James May opting for a Nissan GT-R. The trios adventure takes in crocodile-infested rivers, a race around a vast opencast mine and an encounter with one of the worlds longest lorries, concluding with an unusual challenge involving a farm, their cars and 4,000 cows. Plus, Canadian actor Kiefer Sutherland takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create a gourmet party on a tight budget, preparing cut-price canapes, cakes and tasty treats, with Michelin-starred chef Nigel Haworth giving advice on vegetarian food. Finally, they put everything they have learned to the test when they arrange a surprise celebration for 35 farm volunteers

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira accidentally run over a cat, while David has a run-in with an old colleague who has a business very similar to Rose Apothecary

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Patricks parents are in town for his surprise party, but end up getting a surprise of their own. Alexis drags Moira to a soap opera convention. Sitcom, starring Noah Reid

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Broadcasters Sue Perkins and Liza Tarbuck drive along the Ho Chi Minh Trail, a network of roads and paths in Southeast Asia that was littered with unexploded bombs following the Vietnam War. Their journey takes them through jungles and mountains to some of the least-explored corners of Laos and Vietnam, and proves to be a gruelling test of their bravery, motoring skills and senses of humour

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Counter Terrorism Policing foil an Islamist terror plot, and the CPS Special Crime Unit bring those responsible for a fatal crash on the M62 to justice

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Manchester police take down a gang of teen car thieves, and the Serious Fraud Office unravels a 400-million-pound global fraud in the steel industry

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The crew at Downer Rail in Sydney fix a leaking air conditioner while QRs Rail Operations Response Unit remove debris from high voltage train power lines

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets his good friend, the actor and comedian Barry Humphries, who fell in love with Cornwall in the 1960s when he escaped London to develop his famous character Dame Edna Everage. Barry talks about his friendship with British poet John Betjeman, and asks Rick to review his home-made fishcakes. Rick also goes fishing for crab, before cooking a simple yet delicious crab omelette. The host then takes a dip in the chilly north Atlantic with an eccentric group of wild water swimmers called the Perranporth Blue Tits

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britains finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britains fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers become suspicious when they pull over a businessman from Mexico who is making a rare journey to the United States in a brand new car

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A driver is stopped attempting to smuggle 15kg of cocaine across the border, and a truck drivers modified cab attracts attention at the World Trade Bridge

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorcycle racer leaves his comfort zone as he attempts to set a world speed record for a hovercraft. These machines are notoriously difficult to control, so to learn the basic skills needed hes put through his paces by Royal Marines in a military training operation. To achieve his goal, Guy will need to stay over 86mph for a kilometre, but at these speeds, because of the hovercrafts inherent instability, even the most experienced pilots can lose control - and the worsening weather makes things much more challenging

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May attempt to improve the ambulance, with the presenters all going their own separate ways to enhance one area they think could do with an overhaul. James focuses on passenger comfort, Richard tries to shorten response times by getting other drivers out of the way more effectively, an issue Jeremy tackles with the invention of what he calls the sports ambulance. Their three very different creations are then put to the test with a series of severe and often messy challenges. Plus, Formula One driver Daniel Ricciardo is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the BMW M4 at the track, before switching to the German manufacturers hybrid-powered i8 for a trip up the A1 to Whitby, North Yorkshire, where he decides which of the two he would rather take for the drive home. Richard Hammond pays tribute to the Land Rover by attempting to drive one straight up the side of a dam, and James May puts the Mercedes AMG GT through its paces. Taking to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car are Will Smith and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create gourmet lunches on a tight budget, receiving tips from one of Britains leading Indian chefs and getting insider advice on buying wine on a shoestring. Finally, they put everything they have learned to the test when they arrange a surprise meal for a dinner lady

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets his good friend, the actor and comedian Barry Humphries, who fell in love with Cornwall in the 1960s when he escaped London to develop his famous character Dame Edna Everage. programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake some of the most perilous journeys in the world. Comedians Ed Byrne and Andy Parsons drive along Siberias M56 Kolyma highway, known as the Road of Bones. Along the way, they brave sub-zero temperatures, traverse icy routes, encounter deserted gulags and meet the locals who inhabit the frozen wilderness, but despite picking up practical tips for survival, the duo feel they are out of their depth

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: An RSPCA Special Ops team investigate an international criminal puppy farming operation, and Lancashire officers prosecute an owner for animal cruelty

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The Serious Fraud Office go undercover to investigate a suspect holiday home company offering exclusive residences in the Caribbean

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: In Melbourne, the busy SCT maintenance team expect the unexpected every day as they provision, inspect and shunt engines in and out of a bustling maintenance pit

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets chef Tom Adams, who runs Combeshead Farm, a leading field-to-fork restaurant where they grow and produce all of their own food, from sourdough bread to pork pies, as well as rearing a small herd of Mangalitsa pigs, a hairy, old-world breed that produces exquisite hams. Rick tries out a new recipe - pork chops with a sloe berry sauce - before moving on to the village of Rock, where his son Jack holds a clam bake on the shore of the Camel Estuary

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick discovers an unusual superstition and a rare type of Norman castle in Launceston, before meeting musicians Graham Fitkin and Ruth Wall in the far west of Cornwall

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Documentary with unrestricted access to Americas Customs and Border Protection working on the bridges that separate Texas and Mexico, following the work of the many officers who police the bridges and keep America safe. In the first episode, a shipment of cardboard packaging hides a deadly secret, and heroin disguised as a laptop baffles the worlds most advanced narcotic detection device

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers are suspicious when an elderly couple arrive from Mexico with five suitcases but no clothes, and a truck carrying garden furniture has something extra in the load

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorcycle racer heads to Colorado where he hopes to win one of Americas oldest races - the Pikes Peak International Hill Climb. In this annual contest, known as the Race to the Clouds, riders compete against the clock on a gruelling mountainside track that finishes more than 13,000ft above sea level. To learn the skills required in hill-climb events, Guy visits the birthplace of the sport - Shelsley Walsh in Worcestershire. Racing up the course in an F1-style car, he realises sheer horsepower and driving precision are vital, but he must also take a high-altitude fitness test in a hypoxic chamber to prepare for the challenge ahead

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are in Russia as the motoring magazine returns, taking part in a race across the urban landscape of St Petersburg. James defends the honour of the car in a very small Renault, Richard tries to prove that pedalling is faster by riding a bicycle, while Jeremy attempts to demonstrate that water is the quickest way across town by piloting a hovercraft. To make matters more complicated, all three presenters are racing not only one another but also the Stig, who is making his way toward the finish line by public transport. Plus, the new Lamborghini Huracan is put through its paces and singer-songwriter Ed Sheeran takes to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters embark on a road trip across Australias Northern Territory in fast, luxurious GT cars, with Jeremy Clarkson choosing a BMW M6 Gran Coupe, Richard Hammond picking a Bentley Continental GT V8 and James May opting for a Nissan GT-R. The trios adventure takes in crocodile-infested rivers, a race around a vast opencast mine and an encounter with one of the worlds longest lorries, concluding with an unusual challenge involving a farm, their cars and 4,000 cows. Plus, Canadian actor Kiefer Sutherland takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.desc: A reluctant Brian enters an addiction centre run by monks to treat his alcoholism, but soon becomes bored and looks for a distraction. programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Sister Boniface is called by DI Gillespie to the home of minister of defence Charles Streatham, where guest Mary Sparkes has been found dead at the bottom of a staircase. Quickly assessing Sparkes has been murdered by poisoning rather than by a fall, Gillespie and DS Livingstone have to identify the murderer among the persons in the house - one is reporter Ruth Penny, disguised as a maid and looking for a scoop

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon is looking for love - but the object of her affection seems to prefer her sister Tracey. Meanwhile, Doriens latest young hunk becomes involved in an anti-fur protest, which hits the headlines. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Glaze is keen to find the link between a homeless girl, a red baseball cap and a burning man

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Eva investigates when a famous footballer dies in an apparent armed robbery. Jimmi dashes back home after spending the night at Viviens, and Ruth catches Melody and Daniel in a compromising position at the campus surgery

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A wealthy family friend of Melody is tortured and forced to acknowledge his past in which he ordered the killing of a former employee. Elizabeth Bower stars

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Diane begins her battle for custody of Jack but just when hes needed more than ever, Owen is nowhere to be found. Carlos persuades a reluctant Tricia to go to the breast care clinic, and Wills wife brings the children to the hospital, announcing that he will have to look after them while she goes to a job interview. Mickie endures a harrowing day as a patient dies after giving birth, and she ends up taking one of Donnas pills, with disastrous repercussions

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Jordan is interviewing for Ruths replacement and Miriam thinks she knows just the person, but her old friend Dr Dylan Keogh seems reluctant to apply. However, when he hops onto a bus to come and meet her, it crashes, and he soon finds himself assisting in the ED. Jays ultrasound reveals he has cancer, prompting him to admit defeat and tell his grandmother Maryam she is going into a home, and Ruth escapes from the psychiatric ward

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Glaze is keen to find the link between a homeless girl, a red baseball cap and a burning man

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil takes his anger out on an unsuspecting Jordan. Meanwhile, Roxy stumbles on Dannys mysterious plot, but has she got the wrong idea?

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil learns what has been going on with his children, and hits out with horrible consequences. Meanwhile, the stakes rise when Danny tells Glenda that Ronnie is onto them

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried is pleased with his new time-management system - until he misplaces his diary and has an unfortunate encounter with a Great Dane. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy and Robert Hardy

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Jack and Vanessa honeymoon on Malta, while Charles and Lynne find themselves drawn together

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The local Blainthorp Music Festival celebrates its 50th birthday, bringing with it fierce competition. The sleuth is called in to investigate why competitors have mysteriously started to lose their voices. Light-hearted drama, with Patricia Routledge, Dominic Monaghan and Derek Benfield

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey tries to help ex-con Desmond, but Sharon is convinced he is a lost cause - and she is soon proved right. Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy, Clegg and Compo hit on a solution to their transport problems - building their own bikes. Meanwhile, Sid and Ivys cafe has been redecorated and is set for its grand re-opening. Comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: One of the Last Few Places Unexplored by Man
programme.desc: Compo wants his photo taken and decides Nora Battys bedroom would provide the perfect backdrop. Comedy, starring Peter Sallis and Bill Owen

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Serenade for Tight Jeans and Metal Detector
programme.desc: Clegg buys a metal detector, so Foggy decides to show him how it works by searching for treasure on the Pennines. Meanwhile, Compo struggles with a new pair of jeans. Comedy, starring Peter Sallis

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.sub-title: The Modern Art of Murder: First Chapter
programme.desc: A body is discovered at the opening of a new art gallery, and Matties interviews of the suspects dont paint a pretty picture

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Bergerac returns for the most challenging case of his career when shocking events unfold at a wedding reception on the island

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack examines a case previously undertaken by a deceased colleague, who was convinced that the alleged suicide of a journalist was a cover-up by the American government. Enlisting the help of a UFO-spotter, the team discovers the reporter witnessed a mysterious air crash near a US Air Force base, and the retired officers try to track down the original personnel to get some answers. Guest starring Mark Williams, Glynis Barber, Michael Brandon and Raquel Cassidy, with Amanda Redman

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The mismatched detectives go on the trail of the Wetherton Choker, a killer who calls the local paper with a quotation from Hamlet each time he claims a victim. After the services of a fortune-teller are enlisted, suspicion falls on a nearby gypsy camp. Drama, starring Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: The historian investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure. Focusing on the first third of Agatha Christies life, this episode unearths the surprising roots of her most compelling themes, the inspiration for some of her greatest creations, and the secrets that the enigmatic Christie herself kept carefully hidden from public view

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy explores how American history has been mythologised and manipulated by generations of politicians, writers and protesters. She begins by examining the American Revolution - a David-and-Goliath battle of men with high ideals taking on the might of the British Empire. But how much of Americas founding story is based on fact?

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley debunks the myths behind the American Civil War, revealing how its history has been retold over the years to promote freedom and equality but also hatred and division. She reveals how Abraham Lincolns personal views, and the behaviour of his troops towards African Americans, were not as noble as they appeared. She also learns how history was rewritten in a bid to downplay the evils of slavery, and how a 1905 blockbuster film about the Civil War relaunched the Ku Klux Klan with terrifying results

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: The historian reveals the myths and deceptions told following the United States emergence as a superpower after the Second World War. The 1950s and early 1960s in America is remembered as a golden era of abundance, harmony and the American dream made real. Lucy Worsley reveals that to have been a carefully constructed illusion and that the era of Americas supremacy was a time of government deception, racial conflict and fears of nuclear annihilation

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: The historian investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure. Focusing on the first third of Agatha Christies life, this episode unearths the surprising roots of her most compelling themes, the inspiration for some of her greatest creations, and the secrets that the enigmatic Christie herself kept carefully hidden from public view

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy explores how American history has been mythologised and manipulated by generations of politicians, writers and protesters. She begins by examining the American Revolution - a David-and-Goliath battle of men with high ideals taking on the might of the British Empire. But how much of Americas founding story is based on fact?

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels by train north from Inverness to the Orkney Islands. Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the Cullen Viaduct then enjoys a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. In the factory smokery, he learns from the owner how the famous soup acquires its distinctive taste

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: The actor begins the next part of his journey on Mundoo Island, which has provided shelter and a way of life for five generations of one farming family. Martin Clunes joins Colin and Sally Grundy for a day of cattle mustering. He also explores Phillip Island, one of Australias favourite playgrounds, then heads south to King Island, in the blustery Bass Strait between Tasmania and mainland Australia. Martin completes his odyssey with a visit to see one of the regions most iconic creatures, the Tasmanian Devil

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The actor travels around the coast of the United States to discover what life is like on the surrounding islands. He sets off on a 10,000-mile journey from the west to the east, to explore the vast swathe of islands that are scattered beyond Americas shores. The first port of call on his journey is Hawaii, and his exploration looks beyond its image as a tourist paradise, crammed with sun-kissed beaches and world-class surfing, and into the havoc wreaked by advancing lava fields and smoking craters. Leaving Hawaii, Martin flies 2,500 miles north to the islands of Alaska, where the contrast couldnt be more extreme, from tropical rain forests to snow-fringed glaciers, and from crowded beaches to some of Americas most sparsely populated territories

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The presenter travels 1,500 miles to the San Juan Islands in Washington State, just off Americas North West Pacific coast, on the border with Canada. There are more than 100 islands, mostly uninhabited. From the San Juan Islands, Martin travels down Americas West coast to visit the Channel Islands National Park, which is known as Americas Galapagos because of its unique wildlife. Later, Martin takes a 2,000-mile journey across the States to Louisiana, where he visits Avery Island and Delacroix Island

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The actor visits Puerto Rico, Americas third largest island, and the only one where Spanish is the main language. In 2017, Hurricane Maria ripped through the region, causing the worst disaster in its history. One year on, Martin sees how the locals have begun to recover from the disaster. Later, he travels north to the Sea Islands along the coast of Georgia and the Carolinas, explores part of the 200-mile string of barrier islands of the Outer Banks, and visits Chincoteague island for the annual pony swim

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Documentary examining the rule of Adolf Hitler and his party, focusing on the Eastern Front during the Second World War, which many see as the defining arena of the conflict. In the autumn of 1940, Adolf Hitler has to decide what to do about the Soviet Union and its leader Joseph Stalin. He offers to carve up the post-war world in exchange for his fellow dictators support in the war against Britain, but is actually preparing an attack on the USSR

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In January 1942 the German army lost the battle for Moscow and a furious Hitler sacked or side-lined his leading generals and appointed himself commander-in-chief of the army. He decided on a bold new plan, focusing his forces on seizing the Soviet oil fields and taking the fuel to supply his own troops. Stalin unveiled his own plan to drive the Germans out of the Soviet Union by launching a huge offensive from Leningrad to the Black Sea. Georgy Zhukov warned him that the Red Army was in no shape to attack, but Stalin banished the former chief of the general staff to the front and took control

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitler retreats from public life as he faces defeat on the Eastern Front after the Red Armys triumph at Stalingrad, with senior Nazis competing to prove themselves as his most valuable deputy. Meanwhile, student resistance group the White Rose call on the youth of Germany to rise up and overthrow Hitler and the Nazis, and Claus von Stauffenberg is part of a military resistance network who are planning to kill the Fuhrer

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: The actor begins the next part of his journey on Mundoo Island, which has provided shelter and a way of life for five generations of one farming family. Martin Clunes joins Colin and Sally Grundy for a day of cattle mustering. He also explores Phillip Island, one of Australias favourite playgrounds, then heads south to King Island, in the blustery Bass Strait between Tasmania and mainland Australia. Martin completes his odyssey with a visit to see one of the regions most iconic creatures, the Tasmanian Devil

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The actor travels around the coast of the United States to discover what life is like on the surrounding islands. He sets off on a 10,000-mile journey from the west to the east, to explore the vast swathe of islands that are scattered beyond Americas shores. The first port of call on his journey is Hawaii, and his exploration looks beyond its image as a tourist paradise, crammed with sun-kissed beaches and world-class surfing, and into the havoc wreaked by advancing lava fields and smoking craters. Leaving Hawaii, Martin flies 2,500 miles north to the islands of Alaska, where the contrast couldnt be more extreme, from tropical rain forests to snow-fringed glaciers, and from crowded beaches to some of Americas most sparsely populated territories

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The presenter travels 1,500 miles to the San Juan Islands in Washington State, just off Americas North West Pacific coast, on the border with Canada. There are more than 100 islands, mostly uninhabited. From the San Juan Islands, Martin travels down Americas West coast to visit the Channel Islands National Park, which is known as Americas Galapagos because of its unique wildlife. Later, Martin takes a 2,000-mile journey across the States to Louisiana, where he visits Avery Island and Delacroix Island

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The actor visits Puerto Rico, Americas third largest island, and the only one where Spanish is the main language. In 2017, Hurricane Maria ripped through the region, causing the worst disaster in its history. One year on, Martin sees how the locals have begun to recover from the disaster. Later, he travels north to the Sea Islands along the coast of Georgia and the Carolinas, explores part of the 200-mile string of barrier islands of the Outer Banks, and visits Chincoteague island for the annual pony swim

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Documentary examining the rule of Adolf Hitler and his party, focusing on the Eastern Front during the Second World War, which many see as the defining arena of the conflict. In the autumn of 1940, Adolf Hitler has to decide what to do about the Soviet Union and its leader Joseph Stalin. He offers to carve up the post-war world in exchange for his fellow dictators support in the war against Britain, but is actually preparing an attack on the USSR

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In January 1942 the German army lost the battle for Moscow and a furious Hitler sacked or side-lined his leading generals and appointed himself commander-in-chief of the army. He decided on a bold new plan, focusing his forces on seizing the Soviet oil fields and taking the fuel to supply his own troops. Stalin unveiled his own plan to drive the Germans out of the Soviet Union by launching a huge offensive from Leningrad to the Black Sea. Georgy Zhukov warned him that the Red Army was in no shape to attack, but Stalin banished the former chief of the general staff to the front and took control

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitler retreats from public life as he faces defeat on the Eastern Front after the Red Armys triumph at Stalingrad, with senior Nazis competing to prove themselves as his most valuable deputy. Meanwhile, student resistance group the White Rose call on the youth of Germany to rise up and overthrow Hitler and the Nazis, and Claus von Stauffenberg is part of a military resistance network who are planning to kill the Fuhrer

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy following the life of an eccentric actor with a chequered past, starring Matt Berry. programme.title: Missing Persons Investigation
programme.desc: A man goes missing in mysterious circumstances, and a patient flees the hospital after a suspected heart attack - but no one knows why

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Louis spends time with the global pop star Rita Ora. Louis meets Rita at her dads pub in West London where they sit down for a revealing conversation that takes in her rise to stardom, her familys arrival in the UK in 1990, and the difficulties she has faced dealing with intense press scrutiny and speculation about her personal life. Later, Louis spends time with Rita on the set of her latest music video in LA, before joining her as she puts on a spectacular live performance in Albania

programme.title: Deepfake Porn: Could You Be Next?
programme.desc: The rising trend of harmless images being turned into hardcore porn, footage that is often used against the people depicted with devastating consequences. The film features three women who have been impacted by this form of image-based sexual abuse, including a leading Florida State Senator, Lauren Book, the UK campaigner Kate Isaacs, and Dina, a woman who was deep-faked by a work colleague

programme.sub-title: Nugget, Tetley and the Police Pups

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Hessle, near Hull in East Yorkshire, to transform the home of Darren Hudson, who was left paralysed from the waist down due to a spinal cord injury. After three months of hospital rehabilitation, Darren returned home to his family, but tragedy struck again eight days later when his wife Sarah died suddenly. Since that moment, Darren and his three sons have been living in emotional trauma, with the wheelchair-using dad now the main carer for the family

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets 47-year-old Stuart in Torquay, who has progressive multiple sclerosis. Despite being six foot seven, he sleeps in a chair in the living room. His primary carer is his 73-year-old mother, Grandma Lin, who is completely blind, and walks across town every day to see to her son and her granddaughter Laurens needs. Can the crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians help turn their lives around?

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Plymouth to meet the Morfey family, who sold their multi-level home and bought an old wrought-iron forge with the intention of renovating it for their two eldest sons, who have cerebral palsy. But when their daughter got leukaemia and moved miles away for treatment, supported by mum Tara, the family was torn apart. Now the house remains half-built, with no kitchen, hot water or living space. What the Morfeys need is a little help to bring the family back together

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A one-year-old St Bernard suffering with hip dysplasia is brought to the clinic by the Warden family. Having recently lost the the dogs brother to a similar illness, emotions are running high. Meanwhile, Noel treats a 13-year-old collie that has been hit by a car, and tries to devise a new bionic paw for a cat with a badly deformed hind foot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A four-year-old chinchilla arrives for surgery on a broken leg, but his tiny airways and bones make it a difficult procedure. Meanwhile, a puppy is rushed to the veterinary practice after being hit by a van, and Noel must deal with the risk of infection as he fights to save its limb. Plus, a Labrador undergoes an awkward operation for two bulging discs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Hessle, near Hull in East Yorkshire, to transform the home of Darren Hudson, who was left paralysed from the waist down due to a spinal cord injury. After three months of hospital rehabilitation, Darren returned home to his family, but tragedy struck again eight days later when his wife Sarah died suddenly. Since that moment, Darren and his three sons have been living in emotional trauma, with the wheelchair-using dad now the main carer for the family

His primary carer is his 73-year-old mother, Grandma Lin, who is completely blind, and walks across town every day to see to her son and her granddaughter Laurens needs. Can the crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians help turn their lives around?

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The medics spring into action when a cyclist plunges down a cliff after a freak accident. A homeowners booby trap - designed to deter burglars - sparks a major rescue operation

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: The DI and her team are tasked with solving the murder of a man who was thrown in the river from a party boat - an investigation made all the more difficult by the fact that everyone supposedly loved the victim

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: A young woman murdered on the Glasgow docks hits the officers hard when Michaels brother is named as the next of kin. As the team investigates, Michael is taken off the case

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its a day of firsts for the junior doctors. Claire confronts her fears with a child patient, Tejas steps up to his first trauma case, and Adrian faces his first chest drain

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Kimberly, who is accused of killing a woman she was dating, and learns that Kimberlys life derailed after she got into a car accident and became addicted to opioids

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Bigger Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy presents the first of a two-part special focusing on rehousing Ukrainian refugees in six vacant terraced houses at Kingston College in Mitchelstown, North Cork. Baz is joined by Aoife Rhattigan and Kerry Hiddleston, who oversee the design, while Brandon Duarte from MMD Construction is in charge of the build, and Diarmuid Gavin plans the garden design

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Keira, a dog on the brink of starvation, and gentle old Jack Russell Paige, whose owner had to make the heartbreaking decision to give her up after 15 years

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: This time, Nick Knowles and the team transforms a home in Bromsgrove. Karis, a 28-year-old woman who has cerebral palsy, currently lives with her mother, Karen, but now her own health is deteriorating and it is making caring for Karis almost impossible. The family have decided that Karis should move in with her older sister Jo, but her entire home is inaccessible for Karis, so the team decides to build a large two-storey extension to make the house more suitable. Elsewhere, Billy takes on jousting at Warwick Castle

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team transforms a home in Bolton, Greater Manchester for the Taylor-Mann family, making the house more suitable for nine-year-old William, who has severe autism. Williamss condition means that he is extremely hypersensitive to noise, and being in close proximity to his siblings is often just too much for him to bear. Nick Knowles and the team, with the help of kind volunteers, transform the property to create a quiet, calm space that can help William feel as comfortable as possible

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team create a safe and inspiring home space for the Newcombes, who have a two-year-old son with a very rare lung condition. Trailing breathing tubes, equipment the size of tumble dryers, and no downstairs bathroom have turned their once safe home into a risky space for the family. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel tries to fix a cocker spaniels leg problems by fitting two bionic back feet, before launching a series of investigations into what is causing a cat to drag its leg. Plus, a Westie puppy with a fractured knee arrives, but it cannot keep still

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A woman who suffers from nocturnal epileptic fits brings in Pearl, a Staffordshire bull terrier that can sense when these episodes are about to happen. However, the dog has problems with its knees and struggles to walk, so the pressure is on for Noel Fitzpatrick to restore it back to full health. Plus, an Irish setter has a cancerous tumour in its front leg, and a cat needs its jaw wiring back together after being hit by a car

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: This time, Nick Knowles and the team transforms a home in Bromsgrove. Karis, a 28-year-old woman who has cerebral palsy, currently lives with her mother, Karen, but now her own health is deteriorating and it is making caring for Karis almost impossible.
